items.title: Sad Bonus Hollander POTD Stacey King. Oklahoma C was drafted 6th by CHI in 89. Disappointed early but was big in Game 6 of 92 Finals. Was a pretty solid post scorer. Traded to MIN in 93 where he peaked at 12 ppg 6 rpg. Also had cameos in MIA, BOS & DAL from 95-97. RIP big man.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst

items.title: Asked Lynne Roberts about Sparks’ league-worst defense: “[It’s] very frustrating. ... We’ll fix it. But, yeah, it’s frustrating.” When asked if she’d consider benching underperforming players, she said, “Yes. And that’s the stage we’re at. That’s where we’re at. So, stay tuned.”
items.author: Justin Russo

items.title: What if every TikTok video you watched was printed on a CVS receipt?
items.author: shri
items.body_excerpt:
What if every TikTok video you watched was printed on a CVS receipt?

For the average user, that's dozens of miles of receipt paper per year, and 96% of it was chosen by an algorithm instead of people you follow.

Link to this (somewhat silly) short data story below!

media.title: What If TikTok Had A Paper Trail?
media.description: A thought experiment for infinite feeds on physical media.

items.title: Following back-to-back comeback wins in Games 1 and 2, the Knicks are just the 6th team since 1971 to win consecutive NBA Finals games after trailing by 10+ points!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
Following back-to-back comeback wins in Games 1 and 2, the Knicks are just the 6th team since 1971 to win consecutive NBA Finals games after trailing by 10+ points!

They join:

▪️1975 Warriors
▪️1983 Sixers
▪️1997 Bulls
▪️2006 Heat
▪️2012 Heat
